# getStringProperty()

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getStringProperty(value: unknown, key: string): string | undefined;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts:61](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts#L61)

Reads a string property from an `unknown` value using reflection.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                               |
| --------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `value`   | `unknown` | The value to read from (may be any type). |
| `key`     | `string`  | The property key to access on the object. |

## Returns

`string` | `undefined`

The string value, or `undefined` if the property is absent
or not a string.

## Remarks

Delegates to [getObjectProperty](getObjectProperty.md) for the initial read, then
narrows the result to `string`.  Returns `undefined` when the
underlying value is missing or not a string.
